questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a part of the Peninsular Plateau’s major divisions?
From which state to which state do the Eastern Coastal Plains of India extend?
What is the significance of Westerly Jet Streams in winter?
The Great Plateau of India is a part of which ancient landmass?
The Utkal Plains are situated along which part of India’s coastal plain?
The role of the Himalayas in shaping India's climate includes all, EXCEPT which of the following?
questions.option_1: Acting as a barrier to southwest monsoon winds
questions.option_2: Blocking cold winds from Central Asia
questions.option_4: Contributing to snowfall in northern India

questions.question: What is the approximate total length of the Northern Plains (from West to East)?
The Palk Strait is an inlet of which of the following?
Anaimudi, the highest peak in South India, is located at the tri-junction of which three hill ranges?
questions.option_1: Nilgiri Hills, Western Ghats, Eastern Ghats
questions.option_2: Rajmahal Hills, Garo Hills, Khasi Hills
questions.option_3: Mahadeo Hills, Maikala Range, Rajpipla Hills
questions.option_4: Annamalai Range, Cardamom Hills, Palani Hills
